title: lonchitidaceae
intro: The Lonchitidaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a family of parasitic flowering plants. It contains several species that are known for their unique parasitic relationships with other plants. The Lonchitidaceae family is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world, where they have adapted to thrive in a variety of environments. This family is relatively small, with only a few genera and species classified within it.
